name: Mister
bio:
Catman Wizard who masters the mysteries of stars. Guarding the secrets of stars, he became a Star Walker of the Net of Secrets and unleashes brilliant magical attacks with the Starlight Scepter.

Role: Magical Corrosion
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero that deals massive damage by stacking Corrosion effects.

skillSlots.name: Sorcery Missile
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 random enemy targets for 120% M.DMG.
